name: HR compensation review policy example
answer:
Employees receive 1 compensation review every year.
Employees may request a compensation review after 5 years.
The company operates a private airport shuttle.

sources.title: HR Compensation Review Policy
sources.content:
Employees receive 1 compensation review every year.
Employees may request a compensation review after 1 year.
The company publishes review outcomes within 30 days of the review.
